title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-08
summary: AI Agent frameworks are the dominant category today, with CowAgent (45k stars, +44 daily) and CCPM (8k stars, +5 daily) both showing acceleration anomalies (2.2x and 2.5x respectively). This suggests sustained developer interest in structured, multi-agent development workflows. Meanwhile, ColossalAI (41k stars) exhibits a sudden breakout with acceleration 6x, despite only +4 daily stars, indicating a possible external trigger or renewed attention to distributed training infrastructure. The category breakdown confirms AI Agent frameworks lead in repo count (6) and average daily delta (2178), while Coding Agent/SWE Agent shows high weekly delta (4291) but lower daily activity. No cross-source signals were detected today, and Product Hunt had no relevant launches. The absence of new launches may indicate a lull in launch-day attention, but the sustained GitHub activity suggests organic developer interest.
dataNotes: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。
daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。
Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。
Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

llmSummary.oneLiner: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to autonomous swarms, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Most AI learning resources are fragmented—papers, tutorials, and demos that don't connect. This curriculum provides a structured, end-to-end path where you build algorithms from scratch, understand the math, and ship real tools (prompts, skills, agents, MCP servers) at each step.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 29,886 stars and a sustained 7-day average of 2,767 new stars per day, this repo is experiencing explosive organic growth. The 24-hour delta of 484 stars and acceleration of 0.2 (high) indicate a steady, powerful momentum. Over 150,000 readers and 241,000 page views in the last 30 days confirm massive community interest. The curriculum's promise to bridge the gap between AI tool usage (84% of students) and professional preparedness (only 18%) resonates strongly in today's AI-driven job market.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The consistent high star velocity over the past week suggests word-of-mouth and social sharing are driving adoption, possibly amplified by the creator's prior successful project (Agent Memory) and the curriculum's comprehensive, hands-on approach.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It fills a critical gap: a free, MIT-licensed, from-scratch curriculum that covers the entire AI stack in four languages (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia) and produces portfolio-ready artifacts. The structured 20-phase progression, built-in agent skills for placement and quizzing, and the 'Build It / Use It / Ship It' loop make it uniquely practical and scalable for self-learners.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a goldmine for any developer wanting to deeply understand AI—from linear algebra to multi-agent swarms. It's not just theory; you build and ship real components. The curriculum is designed to be run locally and includes placement tests to skip ahead, making it accessible to a wide skill range.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The demand for practical, end-to-end AI engineering education is exploding. Developers who invest in understanding the fundamentals (not just API calls) will have a significant advantage. This repo signals a shift toward 'build from scratch' as a preferred learning methodology, and the artifact-based output model could become a new standard for technical education.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Software engineers, data scientists, and students who want to master AI engineering from the ground up—especially those who already code (Python recommended) and want to understand how models, agents, and production systems actually work.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The curriculum is massive (~320 hours), which may overwhelm some learners. As an open-source project, maintenance and updates depend on the creator and community. Some lessons may become outdated as AI frameworks evolve rapidly.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers need a persistent, cost-efficient AI coding assistant that leverages DeepSeek's prefix caching to reduce token spend across long sessions, with a configurable, plugin-driven architecture that works as a single static binary.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 19,422 stars, a 24-hour delta of +569, and a 7-day average of +604 stars per day, this project is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.2 indicates continued strong momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting organic, community-driven adoption. It ranks in the top 2-3 in multiple categories (Agents, LLMs, CLI) on OOSmetrics, signaling broad developer interest.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The project recently underwent a ground-up rewrite from TypeScript to Go (version 1.0), which is highlighted in the README as a major shift. This rewrite likely improved performance, reduced binary size, and enhanced cache stability, attracting new users and contributors. The release of the Go binary and the migration guide may have spurred the recent star acceleration.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It combines the popularity of DeepSeek models with a polished, config-driven terminal agent that emphasizes cost efficiency through prefix caching. The Go rewrite delivers a zero-dependency binary, making installation trivial. Its plugin system (MCP-compatible) and sandboxed permissions appeal to developers who want a secure, extensible coding assistant.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Reasonix offers a practical, low-cost way to integrate DeepSeek into daily coding workflows. Its config-driven design and plugin architecture make it adaptable to various use cases, from code review to autonomous task execution. The Go rewrite ensures fast startup and low resource usage.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward purpose-built, model-native agents that optimize for specific API features (like prefix caching) rather than generic LLM wrappers. Developers should consider how to leverage model-specific capabilities (e.g., caching, context windows) to build more efficient tools.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers who use DeepSeek models and want a terminal-based AI coding agent for code generation, review, and task automation. Also suitable for teams looking for a configurable, plugin-extensible agent that can run autonomously or interactively.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Heavy reliance on DeepSeek's API and prefix caching — if DeepSeek changes pricing or caching behavior, the cost advantage may diminish. The project is still relatively new (v1.0 rewrite), so stability and long-term maintenance are unproven. 252 open issues suggest active development but also potential bugs or feature gaps.

llmSummary.oneLiner: An AI agent skill that searches Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web in parallel, scoring results by real engagement (upvotes, likes, money) to produce a grounded, synthesized brief on any topic.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Traditional search engines and individual AI assistants are siloed—they can't simultaneously access Reddit comments, X posts, YouTube transcripts, TikTok engagement, and Polymarket odds. This skill bridges those walled gardens, letting an AI agent search all of them at once and rank results by actual human attention rather than SEO.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo exploded with 1,511 stars in the last 24 hours (538 yesterday, 504 three-day average) and an acceleration ratio of 3, indicating a sudden breakout. With 29,788 total stars and 2,512 forks, it's clearly hitting a nerve. The v3 release (intelligent search, shareable HTML briefs, cross-source clustering) likely triggered the surge, combined with strong community adoption via Claude Code and other agent hosts.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The v3 pipeline was recently released, introducing intelligent pre-research (resolves topics to specific people, subreddits, handles before searching), cross-source cluster merging, single-pass comparisons, auto-discovered competitor comparisons, and shareable HTML briefs. These features dramatically improve the quality and speed of results, making the skill more useful and viral.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a real pain point for developers, researchers, and knowledge workers who need to quickly understand what's happening on multiple social platforms. The zero-config setup, broad platform support, and v3's intelligent search make it immediately useful. The 'before a meeting' use case resonates strongly, and the project's positioning as 'Google for people, not editors' is compelling.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a prime example of an AI agent skill that aggregates fragmented data sources into a single, actionable output. Developers should note the architecture: a Python engine that fans out parallel searches across APIs, scores results by engagement, and uses an LLM judge to synthesize. The skill is extensible (community adding more sources) and integrates with 50+ agent hosts via npx.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The success of /last30days signals a shift toward agent-driven, multi-platform research tools that bypass traditional search. For AI developers, the opportunity is in building similar 'bridge' agents that connect walled gardens (social APIs, prediction markets, niche forums) and rank by real-world signals. The v3 intelligent pre-research pattern—resolving entities before searching—is a key architectural insight.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers, researchers, product managers, sales professionals, journalists, and anyone who needs to quickly gauge public sentiment or track a topic across social media, news, and prediction markets.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party APIs and browser sessions for some sources (X, YouTube, TikTok), which could break or require maintenance. The 105 open issues suggest active development but also potential instability. The sudden breakout may attract copycats or lead to API rate limiting if usage spikes too fast.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your coding agent into a design engine, generating prototypes, decks, images, and videos from a single design system.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Design tools today are either closed ecosystems (Figma, Claude Design) or require manual pixel-pushing. Open Design decouples design from proprietary platforms by letting any coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) read a DESIGN.md, apply brand-grade design systems, and produce real CSS/HTML artifacts that export to PDF, PPTX, or MP4 — all locally, without a cloud dependency.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 61,185 stars and a 24-hour delta of +956 (7-day avg +612), this project is sustaining explosive growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.4 indicates steady, compounding interest rather than a one-day spike. The recent 0.9.0 release with built-in Model Router removes setup friction, making it instantly usable — a clear catalyst for the sustained attention.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The 0.9.0 release introduced an official Model Router that eliminates the need for API key configuration or CLI installation — users can sign in and start designing immediately. This reduction in onboarding friction likely drove the recent acceleration.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It combines two of the hottest trends in AI: agent-native workflows and open-source alternatives to proprietary tools. By supporting 21+ coding agents and offering a Figma-like experience without the canvas, it appeals to developers who want to keep their design pipeline inside their existing agent ecosystem.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Open Design demonstrates that design can be a first-class output of coding agents, not a separate toolchain. Developers should evaluate whether their agent workflows can benefit from generating polished, brand-consistent artifacts directly from code prompts.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward agent-native design: the design system becomes a file (DESIGN.md) that agents read, rather than a proprietary cloud service. For AI developers, this means building agents that can produce production-ready visual outputs is now a viable product direction, and the barrier to entry is lowering rapidly.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and designers who use AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) and want to generate prototypes, decks, images, and videos without leaving their agent environment. Also teams looking for a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design or Figma.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is still in 0.9.0 (pre-1.0), so stability and API changes are possible. It relies on external coding agents and their respective APIs, which may introduce dependency risks. The 375 open issues suggest active development but also potential rough edges.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Colossal-AI is an open-source deep learning system that makes large AI models cheaper, faster, and more accessible through advanced parallelism and heterogeneous memory management.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Training and deploying large AI models (e.g., LLMs, video generation models) is prohibitively expensive and complex. Colossal-AI reduces cost and time by providing efficient distributed training and inference with minimal code changes.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 6 (high), despite a low 7-day average star delta of -0.6. With 41,385 total stars and 4,505 forks, it's a well-established project that recently saw a spike in attention, possibly due to new benchmarks (B200 GPUs showing 50-70% throughput gains) or the release of Open-Sora and DeepSeek fine-tuning guides.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, recent README updates highlight new benchmarks on B200 GPUs, DeepSeek 671B fine-tuning, and Open-Sora video generation, which may have driven the breakout.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It offers a practical, cost-saving solution for training large models (e.g., 30% cost reduction with FP8), supports cutting-edge hardware (B200, H200), and provides turnkey examples for popular models like LLaMA, GPT, and Stable Diffusion.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Colossal-AI is a powerful tool for developers who need to scale model training or inference without deep distributed systems expertise. Its support for multiple parallelism strategies and heterogeneous memory makes it versatile for both research and production.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward democratizing large model training: developers can now achieve near-linear scaling on multi-GPU setups with minimal code changes, reducing the barrier to entry for building foundation models.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI researchers, ML engineers, and startups working on large-scale model training or inference, especially those using PyTorch and seeking cost-effective GPU utilization.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is backed by a company (HPC-AI Tech) that also offers paid cloud services, which may lead to feature prioritization for commercial users. Additionally, the rapid pace of change in AI infrastructure could make some parallelism strategies obsolete.

llmSummary.oneLiner: An MCP plugin that gives AI coding agents semantic code search over your entire codebase using a vector database.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding assistants like Claude Code lack context of large codebases, requiring expensive multi-round discovery or loading entire directories. Claude Context solves this by indexing the codebase into a vector database and retrieving only relevant code snippets via semantic search, reducing cost and improving accuracy.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 11,661 stars, 860 forks, and a sustained 7-day average of 15.1 stars/day (acceleration 1.3), this project is in a steady hot trend. The 24h delta of 16 stars and 7d delta of 105 indicate consistent, organic growth without sudden spikes, suggesting broad adoption among developers using AI coding tools.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. Recent commits (pushed May 22, 2026) and README updates (adding support for multiple MCP clients like Cursor, Gemini CLI, Qwen Code) likely contributed to continued interest.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a critical pain point for developers using AI coding agents: providing full-codebase context without prohibitive costs. The MCP standard makes it plug-and-play with popular tools (Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, etc.), and the free tier of Zilliz Cloud lowers the barrier to entry.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: A practical, cost-effective way to give AI coding agents deep codebase awareness. Worth trying if you use Claude Code or similar tools and work with large repositories.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward agentic RAG workflows in development: instead of feeding entire codebases to LLMs, developers will increasingly rely on semantic indexing to retrieve relevant context on demand. The MCP ecosystem is maturing, and vector databases are becoming a standard infrastructure layer for AI coding.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers using AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, etc.) who work with large codebases and want to improve context quality while controlling API costs.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Dependency on external services (Zilliz Cloud, OpenAI API) introduces vendor lock-in and potential costs at scale. The project is backed by Zilliz, which may bias toward their cloud offering. No recent release tag suggests the project may be in active development with potential instability.

llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding sessions lose context, block on sequential tasks, and produce untraceable code. CCPM enforces a PRD→Epic→Issue→Code pipeline with parallel agent execution and full traceability via GitHub Issues.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The high acceleration and sudden_breakout classification suggest recent external mentions (e.g., social media, newsletters) or word-of-mouth from early adopters. The README mentions integration with multiple AI harnesses, which may have expanded its reach.
llmSummary.whyTrending: CCPM addresses a critical pain point in AI-assisted coding: context loss and lack of structured project management. Its promise of parallel agent execution and full traceability resonates with developers moving from 'vibe coding' to production-grade AI workflows. The Agent Skills compatibility lowers adoption friction.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: CCPM offers a ready-to-use framework for structured, multi-agent development. Developers can adopt it to improve code quality, reduce context switching, and enable team collaboration with AI agents. It's particularly valuable for teams using Claude Code, Codex, or similar tools.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI-assisted developers and teams using agent-based coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Factory, etc.) who want structured project management, parallel execution, and traceability. Also relevant for open-source maintainers and solo developers managing complex projects.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is early-stage (no recent release, no recent commits within 7 days). The high star count may be driven by hype rather than proven reliability. Dependency on GitHub Issues and `gh` CLI may limit adoption for teams using other platforms. The 'no vibe coding' philosophy may not suit all workflows.

repository.name: ncnn
repository.description: ncnn is a high-performance neural network inference framework optimized for the mobile platform

selectedProjects.whyItMatters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +8，前 3 日均值 3.3，加速度 2.4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。
selectedProjects.developerInsight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。

llmSummary.oneLiner: ncnn is a high-performance neural network inference framework optimized for mobile, embedded, and desktop deployment, with no third-party runtime dependencies and support for CPU and Vulkan GPU backends.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Deploying deep learning models efficiently on resource-constrained devices such as phones, embedded systems, and edge devices, without relying on heavy runtime dependencies.
llmSummary.whyNow: The project shows a sudden breakout with a 24-hour star delta of 8 and a 7-day delta of 36, but more importantly, the acceleration ratio is 2.4 (high), indicating a sharp increase in attention velocity. With 23,347 total stars and a recent release within 30 days, the project is experiencing a clear spike in interest, likely driven by new capabilities or community events.
llmSummary.whatChanged: A recent release (within 30 days) and active commits (within 7 days) suggest ongoing development. The README mentions support for new platforms like HarmonyOS and visionOS, which may have attracted new users. No single external trigger is obvious, but the combination of a new release and broad platform support likely contributed to the breakout.
llmSummary.whyTrending: ncnn is a mature, production-grade inference framework from Tencent, used in major apps like WeChat and QQ. Its recent updates expanding platform support (HarmonyOS, visionOS) and the growing demand for on-device AI inference are driving renewed interest.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: For developers building mobile or edge AI applications, ncnn offers a lightweight, high-performance alternative to TensorFlow Lite or Core ML, with direct conversion from PyTorch via pnnx. It's particularly valuable for cross-platform deployment without vendor lock-in.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward more efficient, platform-agnostic inference frameworks that can run on diverse hardware (CPU, Vulkan, RISC-V). Developers should consider ncnn for projects requiring low-latency inference on mobile or embedded devices, especially if they already use PyTorch.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Mobile app developers, embedded systems engineers, AI researchers deploying models on edge devices, and developers working with Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, or WebAssembly.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project has a high number of open issues (1180), which may indicate maintenance challenges or a large user base reporting bugs. The C++ API may have a steeper learning curve for Python-first developers, though Python bindings are available.

selectedProjects.whyItMatters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +44，前 3 日均值 20，加速度 2.2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。

llmSummary.oneLiner: CowAgent is an open-source AI assistant framework that plans tasks, runs tools and skills, and grows autonomously with memory and knowledge, supporting multiple LLMs and messaging channels.
llmSummary.problemSolved: It provides a lightweight, extensible Agent Harness that integrates planning, memory, knowledge, tools, and multi-channel communication, enabling developers to deploy a personal AI assistant that can control computers and external services.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 45,118 stars, a 24h delta of +39, and a high acceleration ratio of 2.5, the project is experiencing a sudden breakout in attention. The 7-day average delta of 18.4 and recent release (v2.1.0 on 2026-06-01) indicate strong momentum.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The recent v2.1.0 release added internationalization, new channels (Telegram, Discord, Slack, WeChat Customer Service), CLI upgrades, streamlined one-line install, and MCP Streamable HTTP support, likely driving the spike.
llmSummary.whyTrending: CowAgent combines a comprehensive feature set (planning, memory, knowledge, skills, MCP, multi-model, multi-channel) with a one-line install and a polished Web console, making it accessible for both developers and end-users. Its rebranding from 'chatgpt-on-wechat' and active community (Skill Hub) also contribute.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: CowAgent is a strong candidate for building custom AI assistants with minimal setup. Its modular architecture and MCP integration allow easy extension, and the multi-channel support enables deployment across various platforms.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward all-in-one agent frameworks that prioritize ease of deployment and extensibility. Developers should consider CowAgent for rapid prototyping of agentic workflows, especially those requiring memory, tool use, and multi-platform messaging.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI developers, hobbyists, and teams looking to deploy a personal or enterprise AI assistant with planning, memory, and tool-use capabilities across multiple messaging platforms.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project has a large codebase and may have a learning curve for customizing advanced features. As a relatively new framework, long-term maintenance and community support are still evolving. The high star count may attract attention but also potential security scrutiny.

repository.name: cognee
repository.description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

selectedProjects.whyItMatters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +29，前 3 日均值 14，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。
selectedProjects.developerInsight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。

llmSummary.oneLiner: Cognee is an open-source AI memory platform that gives agents persistent long-term memory via a self-hosted knowledge graph.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI agents lack persistent memory across sessions, forcing them to re-learn context. Cognee provides a knowledge graph engine that stores, connects, and retrieves information over time.
llmSummary.whyNow: Cognee is experiencing a sudden breakout with 17.7k stars, a 24h star delta of 29, and an acceleration ratio of 2.1 (high). The 7-day average star delta of 15.7 and recent release within 30 days indicate strong, accelerating attention. This is not just steady growth—the velocity has spiked, suggesting a viral moment or major update.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, the recent release (within 30 days) and active commits (within 7 days) suggest ongoing improvements that may be driving adoption.
llmSummary.whyTrending: Cognee addresses a critical gap in AI agent development: long-term memory. With the rise of agentic workflows, developers need a reliable, open-source memory layer. Its integration with Claude Code and other agents, plus a self-hosted knowledge graph, makes it a practical choice.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Cognee offers a ready-to-use memory backend for AI agents, reducing the need to build custom vector/graph storage. Its simple API (remember, recall, forget, improve) and CLI make it easy to integrate.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward persistent, context-aware agents. Developers should consider memory infrastructure as a core component, not an afterthought. Cognee's approach—combining vector embeddings with graph reasoning—may become a standard pattern.
llmSummary.targetUsers: AI agent developers, LLM application builders, teams building conversational agents or copilots that need cross-session memory.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Project is still relatively new (17.7k stars but early-stage). Dependency on specific LLM providers (OpenAI by default) may limit flexibility. Self-hosting requires infrastructure management.

repository.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

selectedProjects.whyItMatters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +625，总 stars 30,027，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。
selectedProjects.developerInsight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。

llmSummary.oneLiner: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to autonomous swarms, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Most AI learning resources are fragmented—papers, tutorials, and demos that don't connect. This curriculum provides a structured, end-to-end path where you build algorithms from scratch, understand the math, and ship real tools (prompts, skills, agents, MCP servers) at each step.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 29,886 stars and a sustained 7-day average of 2,767 new stars per day, this repo is experiencing explosive organic growth. The 24-hour delta of 484 stars and acceleration of 0.2 (high) indicate a steady, powerful momentum. Over 150,000 readers and 241,000 page views in the last 30 days confirm massive community interest. The curriculum's promise to bridge the gap between AI tool usage (84% of students) and professional preparedness (only 18%) resonates strongly in today's AI-driven job market.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The consistent high star velocity over the past week suggests word-of-mouth and social sharing are driving adoption, possibly amplified by the creator's prior successful project (Agent Memory) and the curriculum's comprehensive, hands-on approach.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It fills a critical gap: a free, MIT-licensed, from-scratch curriculum that covers the entire AI stack in four languages (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia) and produces portfolio-ready artifacts. The structured 20-phase progression, built-in agent skills for placement and quizzing, and the 'Build It / Use It / Ship It' loop make it uniquely practical and scalable for self-learners.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a goldmine for any developer wanting to deeply understand AI—from linear algebra to multi-agent swarms. It's not just theory; you build and ship real components. The curriculum is designed to be run locally and includes placement tests to skip ahead, making it accessible to a wide skill range.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The demand for practical, end-to-end AI engineering education is exploding. Developers who invest in understanding the fundamentals (not just API calls) will have a significant advantage. This repo signals a shift toward 'build from scratch' as a preferred learning methodology, and the artifact-based output model could become a new standard for technical education.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Software engineers, data scientists, and students who want to master AI engineering from the ground up—especially those who already code (Python recommended) and want to understand how models, agents, and production systems actually work.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The curriculum is massive (~320 hours), which may overwhelm some learners. As an open-source project, maintenance and updates depend on the creator and community. Some lessons may become outdated as AI frameworks evolve rapidly.

repository.name: DeepSeek-Reasonix
repository.description: DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.
repository.watchlistPromotedReason: Entered Hot Projects 2 times within 14 days.

selectedProjects.whyItMatters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +569，总 stars 19,422，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。

llmSummary.oneLiner: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Developers need a persistent, cost-efficient AI coding assistant that leverages DeepSeek's prefix caching to reduce token spend across long sessions, with a configurable, plugin-driven architecture that works as a single static binary.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 19,422 stars, a 24-hour delta of +569, and a 7-day average of +604 stars per day, this project is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.2 indicates continued strong momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting organic, community-driven adoption. It ranks in the top 2-3 in multiple categories (Agents, LLMs, CLI) on OOSmetrics, signaling broad developer interest.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The project recently underwent a ground-up rewrite from TypeScript to Go (version 1.0), which is highlighted in the README as a major shift. This rewrite likely improved performance, reduced binary size, and enhanced cache stability, attracting new users and contributors. The release of the Go binary and the migration guide may have spurred the recent star acceleration.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It combines the popularity of DeepSeek models with a polished, config-driven terminal agent that emphasizes cost efficiency through prefix caching. The Go rewrite delivers a zero-dependency binary, making installation trivial. Its plugin system (MCP-compatible) and sandboxed permissions appeal to developers who want a secure, extensible coding assistant.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Reasonix offers a practical, low-cost way to integrate DeepSeek into daily coding workflows. Its config-driven design and plugin architecture make it adaptable to various use cases, from code review to autonomous task execution. The Go rewrite ensures fast startup and low resource usage.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward purpose-built, model-native agents that optimize for specific API features (like prefix caching) rather than generic LLM wrappers. Developers should consider how to leverage model-specific capabilities (e.g., caching, context windows) to build more efficient tools.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers who use DeepSeek models and want a terminal-based AI coding agent for code generation, review, and task automation. Also suitable for teams looking for a configurable, plugin-extensible agent that can run autonomously or interactively.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Heavy reliance on DeepSeek's API and prefix caching — if DeepSeek changes pricing or caching behavior, the cost advantage may diminish. The project is still relatively new (v1.0 rewrite), so stability and long-term maintenance are unproven. 252 open issues suggest active development but also potential bugs or feature gaps.

repository.name: last30days-skill

repository.watchlistPromotedReason: Entered Hot Projects 2 times within 14 days.

selectedProjects.whyItMatters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +3293，前 3 日均值 548.5，加速度 6x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。
selectedProjects.developerInsight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。

llmSummary.oneLiner: An AI agent skill that searches Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web in parallel, scoring results by real engagement (upvotes, likes, money) to produce a grounded, synthesized brief on any topic.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Traditional search engines and individual AI assistants are siloed—they can't simultaneously access Reddit comments, X posts, YouTube transcripts, TikTok engagement, and Polymarket odds. This skill bridges those walled gardens, letting an AI agent search all of them at once and rank results by actual human attention rather than SEO.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo exploded with 1,511 stars in the last 24 hours (538 yesterday, 504 three-day average) and an acceleration ratio of 3, indicating a sudden breakout. With 29,788 total stars and 2,512 forks, it's clearly hitting a nerve. The v3 release (intelligent search, shareable HTML briefs, cross-source clustering) likely triggered the surge, combined with strong community adoption via Claude Code and other agent hosts.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The v3 pipeline was recently released, introducing intelligent pre-research (resolves topics to specific people, subreddits, handles before searching), cross-source cluster merging, single-pass comparisons, auto-discovered competitor comparisons, and shareable HTML briefs. These features dramatically improve the quality and speed of results, making the skill more useful and viral.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It solves a real pain point for developers, researchers, and knowledge workers who need to quickly understand what's happening on multiple social platforms. The zero-config setup, broad platform support, and v3's intelligent search make it immediately useful. The 'before a meeting' use case resonates strongly, and the project's positioning as 'Google for people, not editors' is compelling.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a prime example of an AI agent skill that aggregates fragmented data sources into a single, actionable output. Developers should note the architecture: a Python engine that fans out parallel searches across APIs, scores results by engagement, and uses an LLM judge to synthesize. The skill is extensible (community adding more sources) and integrates with 50+ agent hosts via npx.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The success of /last30days signals a shift toward agent-driven, multi-platform research tools that bypass traditional search. For AI developers, the opportunity is in building similar 'bridge' agents that connect walled gardens (social APIs, prediction markets, niche forums) and rank by real-world signals. The v3 intelligent pre-research pattern—resolving entities before searching—is a key architectural insight.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers, researchers, product managers, sales professionals, journalists, and anyone who needs to quickly gauge public sentiment or track a topic across social media, news, and prediction markets.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project relies on third-party APIs and browser sessions for some sources (X, YouTube, TikTok), which could break or require maintenance. The 105 open issues suggest active development but also potential instability. The sudden breakout may attract copycats or lead to API rate limiting if usage spikes too fast.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your coding agent into a design engine, generating prototypes, decks, images, and videos from a single design system.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Design tools today are either closed ecosystems (Figma, Claude Design) or require manual pixel-pushing. Open Design decouples design from proprietary platforms by letting any coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) read a DESIGN.md, apply brand-grade design systems, and produce real CSS/HTML artifacts that export to PDF, PPTX, or MP4 — all locally, without a cloud dependency.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 61,185 stars and a 24-hour delta of +956 (7-day avg +612), this project is sustaining explosive growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.4 indicates steady, compounding interest rather than a one-day spike. The recent 0.9.0 release with built-in Model Router removes setup friction, making it instantly usable — a clear catalyst for the sustained attention.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The 0.9.0 release introduced an official Model Router that eliminates the need for API key configuration or CLI installation — users can sign in and start designing immediately. This reduction in onboarding friction likely drove the recent acceleration.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It combines two of the hottest trends in AI: agent-native workflows and open-source alternatives to proprietary tools. By supporting 21+ coding agents and offering a Figma-like experience without the canvas, it appeals to developers who want to keep their design pipeline inside their existing agent ecosystem.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Open Design demonstrates that design can be a first-class output of coding agents, not a separate toolchain. Developers should evaluate whether their agent workflows can benefit from generating polished, brand-consistent artifacts directly from code prompts.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward agent-native design: the design system becomes a file (DESIGN.md) that agents read, rather than a proprietary cloud service. For AI developers, this means building agents that can produce production-ready visual outputs is now a viable product direction, and the barrier to entry is lowering rapidly.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and designers who use AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) and want to generate prototypes, decks, images, and videos without leaving their agent environment. Also teams looking for a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design or Figma.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The project is still in 0.9.0 (pre-1.0), so stability and API changes are possible. It relies on external coding agents and their respective APIs, which may introduce dependency risks. The 375 open issues suggest active development but also potential rough edges.

aihotHighlights.title: 英国借助 NVIDIA 技术将主权 AI 雄心转化为行动
aihotHighlights.summary: 一年前英国宣布做"AI 制造者"，如今主权 AI 计划取得实质进展：AI 云提供商数量翻倍，Nebius 部署三套 NVIDIA AI 基础设施，预计 2027 年满负荷达 65 兆瓦；基于 5，400 个 NVIDIA GH200 的 Isambard-AI 超级计算机全由零碳电力驱动。主权 AI 基金资助四家 NVIDIA Inception 初创公司：Cosine 训练多模态 MoE 编码模型；Cursive 使用 Megatron-LM 开发自改进 AI 系统；Doubleword 基于 Dynamo 和 Nemotron 3 Super 120B 实现 70 倍冷启动加速、4 倍 KV 缓存压缩，推理成本降低 90-95%；Prima Mente 借助 Blackwell GPU 以近 3 倍训练加速开发生物基础模型。NVIDIA 对英国初创生态投资 20 亿英镑。

aihotHighlights.title: 腾讯混元联合多家机构发布首个音频编辑基准MMAE
aihotHighlights.summary: 腾讯混元联合上海交大、南洋理工等机构推出MMAE（Massive Multitask Audio Editing Benchmark），这是首个全面评估AI语音/音频编辑能力的基准。MMAE要求模型理解现有音频并按自然语言指令精确修改，而非简单生成。当前模型在该基准上的精确匹配率（EMR）低于5%，暴露了可靠音频编辑的短板。MMAE包含2000个真实场景高保真样本、17741条细粒度评估项，覆盖声音/音乐/语音及混合共7种模态、6种任务复杂度（基础修改到多跳推理及多轮编辑）、8种操作类型（局部到全局）。论文、代码、数据集和演示已公开。

aihotHighlights.title: 全球首个：高德发布3D原生城市世界模型ABot-Earth0.5
aihotHighlights.summary: 阿里巴巴旗下高德发布全球首个3D原生城市世界模型ABot-Earth0.5，已建成覆盖190多个国家和地区的3D地图。用户输入卫星图或文字描述，10分钟即可在消费级GPU上生成公里级3D城市，输出可编辑3DGS格式，可直接导入Unity等引擎。制图成本为传统百分之一，效率提升约千倍，可为具身智能、低空经济、应急救援等提供支撑。目前已开放内测，可前往abot-earth.amap.com提交申请。

aihotHighlights.title: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，加速物理AI与自动驾驶
aihotHighlights.summary: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，为LG的机器人、自动驾驶、数据中心和GPU云服务提供加速计算基础设施。双方整合NVIDIA AI工厂平台与LG的消费电子、机器人技术，连接AI模型开发、物理AI数据生成、机器人仿真训练、边缘部署和工厂数字孪生。LG电子将利用NVIDIA Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab仿真训练CLOiD家用机器人，探索采用Isaac GR00T模型，并开发物理AI数据工厂。LG Innotek提供针对NVIDIA GPU优化的机器人传感组件，LG CNS集成NVIDIA机器人技术。双方还将基于NVIDIA DSX平台建设下一代AI工厂，涵盖冷却、模块化设计和800V直流能源方案。LG电子将基于NVIDIA DRIVE平台开发ADAS和车载AI系统。

aihotHighlights.title: 英伟达与斗山集团合作推进物理AI及AI工厂基础设施
aihotHighlights.summary: 英伟达与斗山集团扩大合作，覆盖斗山机器人、斗山山猫、斗山能源及斗山电子材料四大板块。斗山机器人将集成英伟达Isaac Sim、Isaac Lab、Cosmos世界基础模型、Newton物理引擎及Jetson Thor，推进Agentic Robot OS，探索卸垛、打磨等参考用例及双臂/人形机器人。斗山山猫计划将物理AI技术用于建筑、园林、农业设备，加速开发专用世界模型。斗山能源评估通过燃气轮机、汽轮机、小型模块化反应堆及氢燃料电池为AI工厂供电。斗山电子材料为英伟达MGX生态系统供应高性能铜箔基板（CCL），用于AI服务器PCB。

aihotHighlights.title: ChatGPT 要变 AgentGPT 了
aihotHighlights.summary: OpenAI 正筹备 ChatGPT 自 2022 年上线以来最大规模改版，从聊天机器人转向超级应用/Agent 平台，整合编程工具 Codex、图像生成及第三方应用（Canva、Booking）。高管称"聊天已死"，目标成为跨平台个人 AI 助手，未来甚至省去用户输入提示词。改版预计未来几周在网页和手机端上线。商业压力：ChatGPT 有 9 亿周活用户、5000 万付费用户、月收入 20 亿美元但未盈利；企业客户贡献约 40% 收入，目标年底达 50%；Codex 桌面版周活超 500 万。竞争对手 Anthropic 估值已达 9650 亿美元。OpenAI 刚完成 1220 亿美元融资，估值 8520 亿美元，IPO 目标估值可能超 1 万亿美元。

aihotHighlights.title: 特朗普政府与OpenAI讨论通过公共财富基金入股AI初创公司
aihotHighlights.summary: 据FT报道，特朗普政府正与OpenAI探讨通过公共财富基金机制让政府入股AI初创公司。方案是AI企业捐赠小部分股权至该基金，基金通过账户或分红将收益返还美国公民，而非政府直接运营公司。这不同于特朗普去年对Intel的90亿美元直接持股。OpenAI此前已提出公共财富基金概念，持有长期资产，让公民分享AI增长红利。政治背景方面，选民担忧失业、数据中心成本与企业控制，而AI公司需要华盛顿在基建、采购和监管上的支持。

aihotHighlights.title: "我在田里雇了一名工程师，它叫 Codex" -- 北海道一个西兰花农的 8 个真实 AI 用法
aihotHighlights.summary: 日本北海道农民富安弘毅用 ChatGPT 和 Codex 解决农场实际问题，涵盖 8 个用法：拍照识别西兰花病害、卫星监测获取 NDVI 数据、用 ESP32 和 LINE 机器人远程控制温室卷帘、为农场群聊开发机器人管理温度与排期、从聊天记录追踪播种数量、学习 RTK-GPS 自动转向原理并评估自建成本、设计基于 Airtable 的农场管理数据库。他说 AI 让传统昂贵的自动化变得低成本可及，"如同身边有一位超级工程师"。

aihotHighlights.title: Her · हेर - Claude Code 会话分析工具
aihotHighlights.summary: Her（हेर）是专为 Claude Code 设计的会话分析工具。用户上传 `.jsonl` 文件后，Her 用自然语言重建每轮交互，标记部署、配置变更、秘密等高风险操作并定位到具体轮次。它展示 token 消耗、所用工具、子智能体、技能和 MCP 服务器，并结合 Anthropic 与社区最佳实践给出改进建议（仅在有明确可修复模式时）。内置"Ask Her"问答功能，支持单会话与跨会话项目分析。工具不调用第三方 AI API，使用 Nemotron-Mini-4B-Instruct 模型在 Hugging Face ZeroGPU 上运行，评估引擎完全确定，模型仅负责文本生成与建议。Her 内置 Homebrew、npm、PyPI 主流 CLI 工具数据库，自动识别会话中使用的工具，并对部署工具、数据库客户端等执行活动进行标记提醒。

aihotHighlights.title: NVIDIA 与 KRAFTON、NC、T1 在韩国 PC 房庆祝 RTX Spark 发布
aihotHighlights.summary: 继上周 GTC Taipei 发布后，NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang 前往韩国，向当地游戏社区正式介绍 RTX Spark 超芯片。该芯片集成 30 年 NVIDIA 技术，可在 Windows 笔记本上实现全天续航，并以 1440p 分辨率、超过 100fps 运行 AAA 游戏，支持包括 DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction（基于第二代 Transformer 模型）在内的全套 RTX 技术。KRAFTON、NC 与 Riot Games 正合作将旗下游戏适配 RTX Spark。周五，Huang 在 T1 电竞场馆与 Faker 共同亮相，并突袭江南区网吧，演示《PUBG： BATTLEGROUNDS》及基于 NVIDIA ACE 的"PUBG Ally"AI 队友、《CINDER CITY》《AION 2》等作品。《CINDER CITY》首发支持 DLSS 4.5 动态多帧生成与超分辨率。已有超过 100 家 Windows 软件与游戏开发商采纳 RTX Spark。

multiSourceItems.title: 英国借助 NVIDIA 技术将主权 AI 雄心转化为行动
multiSourceItems.summary: 一年前英国宣布做"AI 制造者"，如今主权 AI 计划取得实质进展：AI 云提供商数量翻倍，Nebius 部署三套 NVIDIA AI 基础设施，预计 2027 年满负荷达 65 兆瓦；基于 5，400 个 NVIDIA GH200 的 Isambard-AI 超级计算机全由零碳电力驱动。主权 AI 基金资助四家 NVIDIA Inception 初创公司：Cosine 训练多模态 MoE 编码模型；Cursive 使用 Megatron-LM 开发自改进 AI 系统；Doubleword 基于 Dynamo 和 Nemotron 3 Super 120B 实现 70 倍冷启动加速、4 倍 KV 缓存压缩，推理成本降低 90-95%；Prima Mente 借助 Blackwell GPU 以近 3 倍训练加速开发生物基础模型。NVIDIA 对英国初创生态投资 20 亿英镑。

multiSourceItems.title: 腾讯混元联合多家机构发布首个音频编辑基准MMAE
multiSourceItems.summary: 腾讯混元联合上海交大、南洋理工等机构推出MMAE（Massive Multitask Audio Editing Benchmark），这是首个全面评估AI语音/音频编辑能力的基准。MMAE要求模型理解现有音频并按自然语言指令精确修改，而非简单生成。当前模型在该基准上的精确匹配率（EMR）低于5%，暴露了可靠音频编辑的短板。MMAE包含2000个真实场景高保真样本、17741条细粒度评估项，覆盖声音/音乐/语音及混合共7种模态、6种任务复杂度（基础修改到多跳推理及多轮编辑）、8种操作类型（局部到全局）。论文、代码、数据集和演示已公开。

multiSourceItems.title: 全球首个：高德发布3D原生城市世界模型ABot-Earth0.5
multiSourceItems.summary: 阿里巴巴旗下高德发布全球首个3D原生城市世界模型ABot-Earth0.5，已建成覆盖190多个国家和地区的3D地图。用户输入卫星图或文字描述，10分钟即可在消费级GPU上生成公里级3D城市，输出可编辑3DGS格式，可直接导入Unity等引擎。制图成本为传统百分之一，效率提升约千倍，可为具身智能、低空经济、应急救援等提供支撑。目前已开放内测，可前往abot-earth.amap.com提交申请。

multiSourceItems.title: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，加速物理AI与自动驾驶
multiSourceItems.summary: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，为LG的机器人、自动驾驶、数据中心和GPU云服务提供加速计算基础设施。双方整合NVIDIA AI工厂平台与LG的消费电子、机器人技术，连接AI模型开发、物理AI数据生成、机器人仿真训练、边缘部署和工厂数字孪生。LG电子将利用NVIDIA Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab仿真训练CLOiD家用机器人，探索采用Isaac GR00T模型，并开发物理AI数据工厂。LG Innotek提供针对NVIDIA GPU优化的机器人传感组件，LG CNS集成NVIDIA机器人技术。双方还将基于NVIDIA DSX平台建设下一代AI工厂，涵盖冷却、模块化设计和800V直流能源方案。LG电子将基于NVIDIA DRIVE平台开发ADAS和车载AI系统。

multiSourceItems.title: 英伟达与斗山集团合作推进物理AI及AI工厂基础设施
multiSourceItems.summary: 英伟达与斗山集团扩大合作，覆盖斗山机器人、斗山山猫、斗山能源及斗山电子材料四大板块。斗山机器人将集成英伟达Isaac Sim、Isaac Lab、Cosmos世界基础模型、Newton物理引擎及Jetson Thor，推进Agentic Robot OS，探索卸垛、打磨等参考用例及双臂/人形机器人。斗山山猫计划将物理AI技术用于建筑、园林、农业设备，加速开发专用世界模型。斗山能源评估通过燃气轮机、汽轮机、小型模块化反应堆及氢燃料电池为AI工厂供电。斗山电子材料为英伟达MGX生态系统供应高性能铜箔基板（CCL），用于AI服务器PCB。

multiSourceItems.title: ChatGPT 要变 AgentGPT 了
multiSourceItems.summary: OpenAI 正筹备 ChatGPT 自 2022 年上线以来最大规模改版，从聊天机器人转向超级应用/Agent 平台，整合编程工具 Codex、图像生成及第三方应用（Canva、Booking）。高管称"聊天已死"，目标成为跨平台个人 AI 助手，未来甚至省去用户输入提示词。改版预计未来几周在网页和手机端上线。商业压力：ChatGPT 有 9 亿周活用户、5000 万付费用户、月收入 20 亿美元但未盈利；企业客户贡献约 40% 收入，目标年底达 50%；Codex 桌面版周活超 500 万。竞争对手 Anthropic 估值已达 9650 亿美元。OpenAI 刚完成 1220 亿美元融资，估值 8520 亿美元，IPO 目标估值可能超 1 万亿美元。

multiSourceItems.title: 特朗普政府与OpenAI讨论通过公共财富基金入股AI初创公司
multiSourceItems.summary: 据FT报道，特朗普政府正与OpenAI探讨通过公共财富基金机制让政府入股AI初创公司。方案是AI企业捐赠小部分股权至该基金，基金通过账户或分红将收益返还美国公民，而非政府直接运营公司。这不同于特朗普去年对Intel的90亿美元直接持股。OpenAI此前已提出公共财富基金概念，持有长期资产，让公民分享AI增长红利。政治背景方面，选民担忧失业、数据中心成本与企业控制，而AI公司需要华盛顿在基建、采购和监管上的支持。

multiSourceItems.title: "我在田里雇了一名工程师，它叫 Codex" -- 北海道一个西兰花农的 8 个真实 AI 用法
multiSourceItems.summary: 日本北海道农民富安弘毅用 ChatGPT 和 Codex 解决农场实际问题，涵盖 8 个用法：拍照识别西兰花病害、卫星监测获取 NDVI 数据、用 ESP32 和 LINE 机器人远程控制温室卷帘、为农场群聊开发机器人管理温度与排期、从聊天记录追踪播种数量、学习 RTK-GPS 自动转向原理并评估自建成本、设计基于 Airtable 的农场管理数据库。他说 AI 让传统昂贵的自动化变得低成本可及，"如同身边有一位超级工程师"。

multiSourceItems.title: Her · हेर - Claude Code 会话分析工具
multiSourceItems.summary: Her（हेर）是专为 Claude Code 设计的会话分析工具。用户上传 `.jsonl` 文件后，Her 用自然语言重建每轮交互，标记部署、配置变更、秘密等高风险操作并定位到具体轮次。它展示 token 消耗、所用工具、子智能体、技能和 MCP 服务器，并结合 Anthropic 与社区最佳实践给出改进建议（仅在有明确可修复模式时）。内置"Ask Her"问答功能，支持单会话与跨会话项目分析。工具不调用第三方 AI API，使用 Nemotron-Mini-4B-Instruct 模型在 Hugging Face ZeroGPU 上运行，评估引擎完全确定，模型仅负责文本生成与建议。Her 内置 Homebrew、npm、PyPI 主流 CLI 工具数据库，自动识别会话中使用的工具，并对部署工具、数据库客户端等执行活动进行标记提醒。

multiSourceItems.title: NVIDIA 与 KRAFTON、NC、T1 在韩国 PC 房庆祝 RTX Spark 发布
multiSourceItems.summary: 继上周 GTC Taipei 发布后，NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang 前往韩国，向当地游戏社区正式介绍 RTX Spark 超芯片。该芯片集成 30 年 NVIDIA 技术，可在 Windows 笔记本上实现全天续航，并以 1440p 分辨率、超过 100fps 运行 AAA 游戏，支持包括 DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction（基于第二代 Transformer 模型）在内的全套 RTX 技术。KRAFTON、NC 与 Riot Games 正合作将旗下游戏适配 RTX Spark。周五，Huang 在 T1 电竞场馆与 Faker 共同亮相，并突袭江南区网吧，演示《PUBG： BATTLEGROUNDS》及基于 NVIDIA ACE 的"PUBG Ally"AI 队友、《CINDER CITY》《AION 2》等作品。《CINDER CITY》首发支持 DLSS 4.5 动态多帧生成与超分辨率。已有超过 100 家 Windows 软件与游戏开发商采纳 RTX Spark。

multiSourceItems.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
multiSourceItems.summary: UIUC与Chroma联合推出Harness-1，一个20B参数的检索子智能体。它通过强化学习在一个有状态搜索框架中训练，该框架维护候选池、重要性标注集、证据图和验证记录，由策略决定搜索、筛选、验证及停止的时机。Harness-1在8个基准测试上达到0.730平均curated recall，比下一个最佳开源子智能体高出11.4个百分点，仅落后于Opus-4.6。模型权重和框架代码均已公开。

multiSourceItems.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
multiSourceItems.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

multiSourceItems.title: Job Searcher
multiSourceItems.summary: Hugging Face 发布 Job Searcher，一个基于 AI 的求职搜索工具。用户上传简历并设定偏好后，系统使用教师模型 DeepSeek V4 Pro 生成 LinkedIn 搜索查询，通过 JobSpy 抓取职位，再对学生模型 Qwen3-8B（8B 参数）进行 LoRA 微调，对每个职位从技能匹配、经验相关性、教育背景、行业领域契合度和资历对齐五个维度给出评分和推理。训练在 Modal 平台单张 A100 上完成。推理部署于 Hugging Face ZeroGPU Space，使用 llama.cpp 实现流式输出。项目开源。

multiSourceItems.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
multiSourceItems.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

multiSourceItems.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
multiSourceItems.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

multiSourceItems.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
multiSourceItems.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
multiSourceItems.summary: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

multiSourceItems.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
multiSourceItems.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

trendEntities.title: 英国借助 NVIDIA 技术将主权 AI 雄心转化为行动
normalizedKeys: title:英国借助 nvidia 技术将主权 ai 雄心转化为行动

items.title: 英国借助 NVIDIA 技术将主权 AI 雄心转化为行动
items.summary: 一年前英国宣布做"AI 制造者"，如今主权 AI 计划取得实质进展：AI 云提供商数量翻倍，Nebius 部署三套 NVIDIA AI 基础设施，预计 2027 年满负荷达 65 兆瓦；基于 5，400 个 NVIDIA GH200 的 Isambard-AI 超级计算机全由零碳电力驱动。主权 AI 基金资助四家 NVIDIA Inception 初创公司：Cosine 训练多模态 MoE 编码模型；Cursive 使用 Megatron-LM 开发自改进 AI 系统；Doubleword 基于 Dynamo 和 Nemotron 3 Super 120B 实现 70 倍冷启动加速、4 倍 KV 缓存压缩，推理成本降低 90-95%；Prima Mente 借助 Blackwell GPU 以近 3 倍训练加速开发生物基础模型。NVIDIA 对英国初创生态投资 20 亿英镑。

trendEntities.title: 腾讯混元联合多家机构发布首个音频编辑基准MMAE
normalizedKeys: title:腾讯混元联合多家机构发布首个音频编辑基准mmae

items.title: 腾讯混元联合多家机构发布首个音频编辑基准MMAE
items.summary: 腾讯混元联合上海交大、南洋理工等机构推出MMAE（Massive Multitask Audio Editing Benchmark），这是首个全面评估AI语音/音频编辑能力的基准。MMAE要求模型理解现有音频并按自然语言指令精确修改，而非简单生成。当前模型在该基准上的精确匹配率（EMR）低于5%，暴露了可靠音频编辑的短板。MMAE包含2000个真实场景高保真样本、17741条细粒度评估项，覆盖声音/音乐/语音及混合共7种模态、6种任务复杂度（基础修改到多跳推理及多轮编辑）、8种操作类型（局部到全局）。论文、代码、数据集和演示已公开。

trendEntities.title: 全球首个：高德发布3D原生城市世界模型ABot-Earth0.5
normalizedKeys: title:全球首个 高德发布3d原生城市世界模型abot earth0 5

items.title: 全球首个：高德发布3D原生城市世界模型ABot-Earth0.5
items.summary: 阿里巴巴旗下高德发布全球首个3D原生城市世界模型ABot-Earth0.5，已建成覆盖190多个国家和地区的3D地图。用户输入卫星图或文字描述，10分钟即可在消费级GPU上生成公里级3D城市，输出可编辑3DGS格式，可直接导入Unity等引擎。制图成本为传统百分之一，效率提升约千倍，可为具身智能、低空经济、应急救援等提供支撑。目前已开放内测，可前往abot-earth.amap.com提交申请。

trendEntities.title: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，加速物理AI与自动驾驶
normalizedKeys: title:nvidia与lg集团合作建设ai工厂 加速物理ai与自动驾驶

items.title: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，加速物理AI与自动驾驶
items.summary: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，为LG的机器人、自动驾驶、数据中心和GPU云服务提供加速计算基础设施。双方整合NVIDIA AI工厂平台与LG的消费电子、机器人技术，连接AI模型开发、物理AI数据生成、机器人仿真训练、边缘部署和工厂数字孪生。LG电子将利用NVIDIA Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab仿真训练CLOiD家用机器人，探索采用Isaac GR00T模型，并开发物理AI数据工厂。LG Innotek提供针对NVIDIA GPU优化的机器人传感组件，LG CNS集成NVIDIA机器人技术。双方还将基于NVIDIA DSX平台建设下一代AI工厂，涵盖冷却、模块化设计和800V直流能源方案。LG电子将基于NVIDIA DRIVE平台开发ADAS和车载AI系统。
items.description: NVIDIA与LG集团合作建设AI工厂，为LG的机器人、自动驾驶、数据中心和GPU云服务提供加速计算基础设施。双方整合NVIDIA AI工厂平台与LG的消费电子、机器人技术，连接AI模型开发、物理AI数据生成、机器人仿真训练、边缘部署和工厂数字孪生。LG电子将利用NVIDIA Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab仿真训练CLOiD家用机器人，探索采用Isaac GR00T模型，并开发物理AI数据工厂。LG Innotek提供针对NVIDIA GPU优化的机器人传感组件，LG CNS集成NVIDIA机器人技术。双方还将基于NVIDIA DSX平台建设下一代AI工厂，涵盖冷却、模块化设计和800V直流能源方案。LG电子将基于NVIDIA DRIVE平台开发ADAS和车载AI系统。

trendEntities.title: 英伟达与斗山集团合作推进物理AI及AI工厂基础设施
normalizedKeys: title:英伟达与斗山集团合作推进物理ai及ai工厂基础设施

items.title: 英伟达与斗山集团合作推进物理AI及AI工厂基础设施
items.summary: 英伟达与斗山集团扩大合作，覆盖斗山机器人、斗山山猫、斗山能源及斗山电子材料四大板块。斗山机器人将集成英伟达Isaac Sim、Isaac Lab、Cosmos世界基础模型、Newton物理引擎及Jetson Thor，推进Agentic Robot OS，探索卸垛、打磨等参考用例及双臂/人形机器人。斗山山猫计划将物理AI技术用于建筑、园林、农业设备，加速开发专用世界模型。斗山能源评估通过燃气轮机、汽轮机、小型模块化反应堆及氢燃料电池为AI工厂供电。斗山电子材料为英伟达MGX生态系统供应高性能铜箔基板（CCL），用于AI服务器PCB。

items.title: ChatGPT 要变 AgentGPT 了
items.summary: OpenAI 正筹备 ChatGPT 自 2022 年上线以来最大规模改版，从聊天机器人转向超级应用/Agent 平台，整合编程工具 Codex、图像生成及第三方应用（Canva、Booking）。高管称"聊天已死"，目标成为跨平台个人 AI 助手，未来甚至省去用户输入提示词。改版预计未来几周在网页和手机端上线。商业压力：ChatGPT 有 9 亿周活用户、5000 万付费用户、月收入 20 亿美元但未盈利；企业客户贡献约 40% 收入，目标年底达 50%；Codex 桌面版周活超 500 万。竞争对手 Anthropic 估值已达 9650 亿美元。OpenAI 刚完成 1220 亿美元融资，估值 8520 亿美元，IPO 目标估值可能超 1 万亿美元。

trendEntities.title: 特朗普政府与OpenAI讨论通过公共财富基金入股AI初创公司
normalizedKeys: title:特朗普政府与openai讨论通过公共财富基金入股ai初创公司

items.title: 特朗普政府与OpenAI讨论通过公共财富基金入股AI初创公司
items.summary: 据FT报道，特朗普政府正与OpenAI探讨通过公共财富基金机制让政府入股AI初创公司。方案是AI企业捐赠小部分股权至该基金，基金通过账户或分红将收益返还美国公民，而非政府直接运营公司。这不同于特朗普去年对Intel的90亿美元直接持股。OpenAI此前已提出公共财富基金概念，持有长期资产，让公民分享AI增长红利。政治背景方面，选民担忧失业、数据中心成本与企业控制，而AI公司需要华盛顿在基建、采购和监管上的支持。

trendEntities.title: "我在田里雇了一名工程师，它叫 Codex" -- 北海道一个西兰花农的 8 个真实 AI 用法
normalizedKeys: title:我在田里雇了一名工程师 它叫 codex 北海道一个西兰花农的 8 个真实 ai 用法

items.title: "我在田里雇了一名工程师，它叫 Codex" -- 北海道一个西兰花农的 8 个真实 AI 用法
items.summary: 日本北海道农民富安弘毅用 ChatGPT 和 Codex 解决农场实际问题，涵盖 8 个用法：拍照识别西兰花病害、卫星监测获取 NDVI 数据、用 ESP32 和 LINE 机器人远程控制温室卷帘、为农场群聊开发机器人管理温度与排期、从聊天记录追踪播种数量、学习 RTK-GPS 自动转向原理并评估自建成本、设计基于 Airtable 的农场管理数据库。他说 AI 让传统昂贵的自动化变得低成本可及，"如同身边有一位超级工程师"。

trendEntities.title: Her · हेर - Claude Code 会话分析工具
normalizedKeys: title:her ह र claude code 会话分析工具

items.title: Her · हेर - Claude Code 会话分析工具
items.summary: Her（हेर）是专为 Claude Code 设计的会话分析工具。用户上传 `.jsonl` 文件后，Her 用自然语言重建每轮交互，标记部署、配置变更、秘密等高风险操作并定位到具体轮次。它展示 token 消耗、所用工具、子智能体、技能和 MCP 服务器，并结合 Anthropic 与社区最佳实践给出改进建议（仅在有明确可修复模式时）。内置"Ask Her"问答功能，支持单会话与跨会话项目分析。工具不调用第三方 AI API，使用 Nemotron-Mini-4B-Instruct 模型在 Hugging Face ZeroGPU 上运行，评估引擎完全确定，模型仅负责文本生成与建议。Her 内置 Homebrew、npm、PyPI 主流 CLI 工具数据库，自动识别会话中使用的工具，并对部署工具、数据库客户端等执行活动进行标记提醒。

trendEntities.title: NVIDIA 与 KRAFTON、NC、T1 在韩国 PC 房庆祝 RTX Spark 发布
normalizedKeys: title:nvidia 与 krafton nc t1 在韩国 pc 房庆祝 rtx spark 发布

items.title: NVIDIA 与 KRAFTON、NC、T1 在韩国 PC 房庆祝 RTX Spark 发布
items.summary: 继上周 GTC Taipei 发布后，NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang 前往韩国，向当地游戏社区正式介绍 RTX Spark 超芯片。该芯片集成 30 年 NVIDIA 技术，可在 Windows 笔记本上实现全天续航，并以 1440p 分辨率、超过 100fps 运行 AAA 游戏，支持包括 DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction（基于第二代 Transformer 模型）在内的全套 RTX 技术。KRAFTON、NC 与 Riot Games 正合作将旗下游戏适配 RTX Spark。周五，Huang 在 T1 电竞场馆与 Faker 共同亮相，并突袭江南区网吧，演示《PUBG： BATTLEGROUNDS》及基于 NVIDIA ACE 的"PUBG Ally"AI 队友、《CINDER CITY》《AION 2》等作品。《CINDER CITY》首发支持 DLSS 4.5 动态多帧生成与超分辨率。已有超过 100 家 Windows 软件与游戏开发商采纳 RTX Spark。

trendEntities.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
normalizedKeys: title:harness 1 基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20b检索子智能体

items.title: Harness-1：基于强化学习训练的有状态搜索20B检索子智能体
items.summary: UIUC与Chroma联合推出Harness-1，一个20B参数的检索子智能体。它通过强化学习在一个有状态搜索框架中训练，该框架维护候选池、重要性标注集、证据图和验证记录，由策略决定搜索、筛选、验证及停止的时机。Harness-1在8个基准测试上达到0.730平均curated recall，比下一个最佳开源子智能体高出11.4个百分点，仅落后于Opus-4.6。模型权重和框架代码均已公开。

trendEntities.title: M3与Opus代码审计13个bug：$0.07 vs $1.30

items.title: M3与Opus代码审计13个bug：$0.07 vs $1.30
items.summary: 对 Claude Opus 4.8 和 MiniMax M3 进行相同的代码审计：同一代码库、同一提示词，预先植入 17 个已知 bug。MiniMax M3 以 $0.07 抓到 13 个；最便宜的 Claude 运行同样抓到 13 个，花费 $1.30。MiniMax 表示这一对比非常有趣，绝对值得一读。

trendEntities.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
normalizedKeys: title:github 开源 spec kit 工具包 用产品规范引导 ai 编码

items.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
items.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

trendEntities.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
normalizedKeys: title:opencv 5 发布 升级全新 dnn 引擎 原生支持大模型

items.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
items.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

trendEntities.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛

items.title: PixelDiT入选CVPR2026最佳论文决赛
items.summary: 被选为 #CVPR2026 最佳论文决赛作品：来自 NVIDIA Research 的 PixelDiT 在大多数图像生成模型中，预训练的自编码器会在任何扩散发生前压缩图像，导致质量损失在整个流程中累积。 PixelDiT，即像素扩散变换器，完全去掉了这一步骤。它是一个单阶段模型，直接在像素空间中端到端地学习扩散过程。

items.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
items.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

items.title: OpenCV 5 发布：升级全新 DNN 引擎、原生支持大模型
items.summary: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。
items.description: OpenCV 5 正式发布，采用基于图的 DNN 引擎，ONNX 算子覆盖率从 4.x 的不到 23% 提升至超 80%，原生支持 Transformer、视觉语言模型（VLM）和大语言模型（LLM）。其他更新包括：更好的 Python 集成与命名参数、更紧凑核心代码、清晰硬件加速层、原生 FP16/BF16、规范化 0D/1D 张量、扩展 3D 视觉及现代化文档。该库 GitHub 拥有超 86，000 stars，每日安装量超一百万次。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

items.title: Her · हेर - Claude Code 会话分析工具
items.summary: Her（हेर）是专为 Claude Code 设计的会话分析工具。用户上传 `.jsonl` 文件后，Her 用自然语言重建每轮交互，标记部署、配置变更、秘密等高风险操作并定位到具体轮次。它展示 token 消耗、所用工具、子智能体、技能和 MCP 服务器，并结合 Anthropic 与社区最佳实践给出改进建议（仅在有明确可修复模式时）。内置"Ask Her"问答功能，支持单会话与跨会话项目分析。工具不调用第三方 AI API，使用 Nemotron-Mini-4B-Instruct 模型在 Hugging Face ZeroGPU 上运行，评估引擎完全确定，模型仅负责文本生成与建议。Her 内置 Homebrew、npm、PyPI 主流 CLI 工具数据库，自动识别会话中使用的工具，并对部署工具、数据库客户端等执行活动进行标记提醒。

items.title: 对比一下 GPT-5.5 的设计效果和 Opus 4.8 的设计效果
items.summary: 宝玉对比了GPT-5.5与Opus 4.8的设计能力，认为Opus 4.8效果远优于GPT-5.5。他使用了基于Cursor浏览器和元素标注的baoyu-design Skill，该Skill通过npx skills add JimLiu/baoyu-design安装，可在本地运行：描述屏幕需求即可生成精良HTML，点击预览中任意元素即可发出修改指令。官方推荐搭配Opus 4.8以获得最佳效果。工具GitHub仓库：https：//github.com/JimLiu/baoyu-design。
items.description: 宝玉对比了GPT-5.5与Opus 4.8的设计能力，认为Opus 4.8效果远优于GPT-5.5。他使用了基于Cursor浏览器和元素标注的baoyu-design Skill，该Skill通过npx skills add JimLiu/baoyu-design安装，可在本地运行：描述屏幕需求即可生成精良HTML，点击预览中任意元素即可发出修改指令。官方推荐搭配Opus 4.8以获得最佳效果。工具GitHub仓库：https：//github.com/JimLiu/baoyu-design。

items.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
items.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

sourceItems.summary: 宝玉对比了GPT-5.5与Opus 4.8的设计能力，认为Opus 4.8效果远优于GPT-5.5。他使用了基于Cursor浏览器和元素标注的baoyu-design Skill，该Skill通过npx skills add JimLiu/baoyu-design安装，可在本地运行：描述屏幕需求即可生成精良HTML，点击预览中任意元素即可发出修改指令。官方推荐搭配Opus 4.8以获得最佳效果。工具GitHub仓库：https：//github.com/JimLiu/baoyu-design。

sourceItems.title: GitHub 开源 Spec Kit 工具包，用产品规范引导 AI 编码
sourceItems.summary: GitHub 发布开源工具包 Spec Kit，旨在解决 "vibe coding" 的最大弱点--AI 常在规则未明确时就开始编码。它把流程从 "让 AI 直接构建" 改为 "先写产品规范，再让 AI 根据规范实现"。当前 AI 编码模式常因松散提示直接跳入代码，导致需求薄弱、边界遗漏和反复返工。Spec Kit 推动反向流程：先定义产品功能，再澄清差距、制订技术计划、分解任务，最后让 agent 执行。规范成为可执行的开发合约，支持 Copilot、Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor、Qwen 等 30+ agent 集成。项目已获 109K+ 星标。

items.title: 五个实验室，五个心智：用小模型构建多模型金融剧情游戏
items.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。

items.title: Persona Atlas：Hugging Face 上的开源人物思维映射工具
items.summary: Persona Atlas 是一个运行在 Hugging Face Inference Providers 上的开源项目。它通过工具调用代理执行真实网络搜索，生成公众人物的资料、事实清单和风格假设，然后让该人物回答十个关于身份、伦理等开放式问题。每个回答被转化为嵌入向量，从而在向量空间中对不同人物进行距离比较，并基于十个特质锚点绘制热力图。前端采用 Gradio，提供研究、比较和检查代理完整追溯三个标签页，预设多个人物角色，无需 token 即可直接体验。

items.title: 用Qwen2.5-3B构建多智能体经济体：工程报告
items.summary: 开发者用Qwen2.5-3B构建了五人森林生物多智能体经济体，每个智能体独立运行，通过vLLM部署在Modal，以Gradio为交互窗口。3B模型在100%调用中输出有效JSON，但经济判断能力弱。通过设计稀缺性（食物品种限制、易腐坏、冬季燃料危机）和优化提示词（禁止买入自产物品、给出示例）提升决策质量。15轮模拟中，蜜价从10跌至3、柴价从4涨至7、财富基尼系数从0.14扩至0.38。项目展示了小模型可靠格式化与不可靠推理之间的工程填补。

topicClusters.summary: Thousand Token Wood v2使用四个不同实验室的小模型（gpt-oss-20b、MiniCPM3-4B、Nemotron-Mini-4B及微调Qwen 0.5B）驱动金融模拟游戏的智能体。核心发现是异构服务层摩擦在于vLLM 0.22.1需CUDA工具包，而非模型本身。通过容忍性JSON解析层，添加模型只需一条配置。信息隔离确保内幕标志不在提示词中，扫描测试验证无泄露。记忆用情绪摘要截断避免淹没。微调0.5B模型实现0%自成交、100%有效报价，真相防火墙零泄露。小模型是可靠格式生成器但不可靠推理器，可通过结构化、提示词和微调弥补。
topicClusters.whyItMatters: 同一趋势被 3 个来源、6 条信号捕捉。

headline: AI Agent frameworks dominate attention with CowAgent and CCPM both accelerating, while distributed training infrastructure ColossalAI sees a sudden breakout despite low absolute star velocity.
